creator: clive@CirX.ORG
text:
I have the habit to make install a software then make deinstall after
    doing that. If everything's ok, I'll really install it. So I found the
    missing line should be in gimp1-i18n/pkg/PLIST :)

How-To-Repeat: 
	under ports/graphic/gimp1-i18n, make install deinstall.
